name: RHS Triton (Y 5)
events: 23 Mar 1941 Triton (Lt.Cdr. D. Zepos, HN) torpedoed and sank the Italian merchant Carnia (5154 GRT) in the Adriatic Sea about 30 nautical miles east of Cape Galo, Brindisi, Italy in position 40°58'N, 18°27'E.
10 Jun 1942 Triton (Lt.Cdr. E. Kontoyiannis, HN) sank a small sailing vessel with gunfire in the Aegean Sea off Thira.
11 Jun 1942 Triton (Lt.Cdr. E. Kontoyiannis, HN) sank the Greek sailing vessel Issodia with gunfire in the Aegean Sea off Thira.
13 Jun 1942 Triton (Lt.Cdr. E. Kontoyiannis, HN) sank a Greek sailing vessel with gunfire in the Aegean Sea off Eub?a.
